alert_summary: Enterprise-wide fault propagating across 4 topology domains.

alert_timeline.message: [Branch Edge] User-facing service failure — connection refused or timeout from upstream
[Branch Edge] Packet drop rate elevated — possible policy or routing change
[WAN Transport] Incident propagates across diagram boundary — router node on inter-domain link
[Data Center Fabric] Service health check failing — connection refused from upstream
[Application / Database Tier] Cross-diagram correlation confirms this as the common upstream dependency for all impacted domains.
[Application / Database Tier] Cross-diagram correlation confirms this as the common upstream dependency for all impacted domains.

propagation_steps.description: User-facing failure detected at the ingress point of the incident.
propagation_steps.title: First observed symptom

propagation_steps.description: Alert propagates through local network layer toward upstream.
propagation_steps.title: Local dependency expansion

propagation_steps.description: Incident crosses diagram boundary — inter-domain link implicated.
propagation_steps.title: Cross-diagram bridge

propagation_steps.description: Downstream topology domain begins reporting cascading failures.
propagation_steps.title: Downstream enterprise impact

propagation_steps.description: Cross-diagram correlation identifies the common upstream dependency.
propagation_steps.title: Root cause ranked

reasoning_steps: 1. First symptom at BR-APP-01 (branch_topology) — [Branch Edge] User-facing service failure — connection refused or timeout from upstream
2. Alert propagation across 4 diagrams: branch_topology, wan_topology, datacenter_topology, app_db_topology.
3. Cross-diagram correlation identifies: APP-LB-01 in app_db_topology.
recommended_actions: Investigate APP-LB-01 in app_db_topology for connectivity or configuration changes
Review cross-diagram stitch links for recent topology changes
Check shared service dependencies (DNS, IAM, NTP) that span multiple diagrams
Validate WAN and backbone path health metrics
Correlate syslog and interface metrics across all impacted diagrams
